docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO PHYLLIS THOMPSON SCOTTSDALE INS RETURNED SIGNED;

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KHARBANDA, SANJEEV DBA SUPERFAIR MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INS. CO. C/O PHYLLIS THOMPS/TRANSC/ASSO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF. PAID $6.00 FOR CERTIFIED MAILING, BUT IT WAS ENTERED UNDER THE WRONG CASE NO.777377; THEREFORE, A 2ND CERTIFIED MAILING WAS SENT OUT.FEES EXEMPTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHARBANDA, SANJEEV DBA SUPERFAIR MARKET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCOTTSDALE INS. CO. C/O PHYLLIS THOMPS/TRANSC/ASSO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED RECEIPT SENT TO PHYLLIS THOMPSON (TRANSCAL ASSOCIATES) RETURNED SIGNED.
